hero.headline: Turn hours of video into minutes of reading
hero.subheadline: Batch summarize multiple YouTube videos with AI. Get comprehensive summaries in your preferred style and language.

features.title: Powerful Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to transform video content into actionable insights

batchProcessing.title: Batch Processing
batchProcessing.description: Summarize multiple YouTube videos simultaneously. Save time by processing entire playlists or video series at once.

aiPowered.title: AI-Powered
aiPowered.description: Leverage advanced AI to extract key insights, main points, and actionable information from hours of video content.

multiLanguage.title: Multi-Language
multiLanguage.description: Get summaries in your preferred language. Support for multiple languages ensures you understand content in your native tongue.

customStyles.title: Custom Styles
customStyles.description: Choose from various summary styles - detailed, concise, bullet points, or create your own custom prompt.
